log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tortle — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tortle — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 18] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 18] HIT! 16 damage. Tortle — Iron Concentration HP: 51/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 18] MISS.
--- Tortle — Iron Concentration --- HP: 51/67 | AC: 18
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
